top_signals.title: Brutal nights and humidity mark Europe’s record June temperatures
top_signals.summary: Daytime peaks on the continent rising three times as fast as the wider rate of global warming, scientists say
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Binance to stop providing services to EU clients after failing to obtain licence
top_signals.summary: World’s biggest crypto exchange tells customers how to withdraw their money as MiCA rules set to come into force
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Apple Price Hikes Rattle Tech, Europe's Record Heat Wave | The Pulse 6/26/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, Goldman Sachs Head of Asset Allocation Research; Philipp Freise, KKR Co-Head of European Private Equity; Sarah Kapnick, JPMorgan Global Head of Climate Advisory (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
